title: Add JWT v2 RS256 service with RBAC middleware
description: Redesign authentication system by adding JWT v2 service using RS256 signing algorithm, adding RBAC middleware for admin/editor/viewer role gating with hierarchical inheritance, and updating _auth.ts to support both legacy and new auth modes during 30-day migration. New jwt-v2.ts uses RSA key pairs instead of HMAC secrets. RBAC middleware extends existing role-guard pattern. All changes must be backwards compatible with existing HS256 tokens.
existing_patterns: src/auth/_auth.ts:ROLE_HIERARCHY defines admin(3)>editor(2)>viewer(1) role hierarchy used by checkRole
src/auth/jwt-service.ts:JwtService class with sign/verify methods, blacklisting, signAccessToken(15min)/signRefreshToken(7days) pattern
src/middleware/role-guard.ts:requireRole higher-order function returning error or undefined, reused by auth-middleware
src/auth/auth-service.ts:AuthService with login/refresh/verifyAccessToken/logout using JwtService, uses Payload SDK for user queries
src/collections/Users.ts:Payload users collection with role select (admin/editor/viewer), refreshToken, tokenExpiresAt fields
